findings.message: rename_item() bypasses the repository pattern and breaks the documented data invariant: slug must stay in sync with name. The function updates only item.name without recalculating slug (line 48), causing divergence from the derived field's canonical derivation rule (name.strip().lower().replace(" ", "-")). This violates the explicit contract in models.py lines 16-17 that states 'It must stay in sync with name — update both together via repository helpers.'
findings.suggestion: Use the update_item_name() repository helper instead of direct mutation. Replace lines 45-51 with: result = update_item_name(session, item_id, payload.name); if result is None: raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail='Item not found'); return result
